name: IAG Peering GbR
notes: Founded in 2006 as joint fiber and network project we serve multiple national und international customers with peering bandwidth from KleyReX, Decix and Equinix IX peers as well as from private peering connections. Also we deliver wavelength services in Frankfurt. We offer these services at multiple locations in Frankfurt. Ask at Internet AG, Aixit and GHOSTnet for quotes or mail to noc@as31025.net.
